ground_truth.title: Fastest Blockchains by TPS [2025] | Chainspect
ground_truth.author: Chainspect
ground_truth.main_content: Chainspect is a blockchain analytics platform providing real-time data and metrics on various blockchain networks. The platform offers dashboards for scalability, decentralization, developer activity, and financials across multiple blockchain ecosystems. Users can compare different blockchains and access detailed metrics including Transactions Per Second (TPS), max TPS, and theoretical TPS capabilities. The platform includes a comprehensive directory of blockchain networks including major chains such as Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin, Avalanche, Polygon, and many others. Navigation provides access to various analytical tools and comparative views of blockchain performance metrics.
with: Discover the fastest blockchains ranked by Transactions Per Second (TPS).
View the Real-Time TPS, Max TPS, Max Theoretical TPS, and more!
Chainspect is a blockchain analytics platform providing real-time data and metrics.
The platform offers dashboards for scalability, decentralization, developer activity, and financials.
Users can compare different blockchains and access detailed metrics including TPS capabilities.
without: Navigation menu items like Dashboards, Chains, Compare, Other
Sidebar search functionality with keyboard shortcut hints
Sentry tracing and performance monitoring scripts
